message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array with 3 objects. Each object: "question" field: the word "Chapters", "Description", "Structure" respectively. Provide feedback and compliance boolean.

We need to evaluate the given text: "Īss katras noslēguma darba nodaļas un pielikumu satura apraksts." Means "Short description of each thesis chapter and appendix content." So it's just a sentence, not listing sections. So:

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections? No. So compliance false. Feedback: text doesn't list sections.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? No. So false. Feedback: no descriptions.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure? No. So false. Feedback: unclear structure.

Thus all false. Provide JSON array.
